etymology.description: Semantic: 生(生) (shēng, "life") + Phonetic: 生(生) (shēng) duplicated for sound
etymology.interpretation: The character 甡(shēn) uses the duplication of 生(生) (shēng, "life") to emphasize or replicate the phonetic sound. This structure is designed to convey the specific pronunciation rather than a literal meaning from the characters, as such configurations often do when components are repeated.
